title: H2O Plumbers - the best of George, 3 times in a row!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - H2O Plumbers started in 2007...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - H2O Plumbers started in 2007 with a mere R200 in the bank and fuelled by a dream to bring plumbing excellence to the beautiful city of George, the greater Garden Route and the Klein Karoo.


> H20 Plumbers has now officially been voted, for the third consecutive year, the best plumbers in George by the readers of George Herald in the 'Best of George Readers' Choice' Awards.


Owner and founder, Bruce Coetsee, has built up H2O Plumbers from one operational team to four vibrant plumbing maintenance teams, serving homes and businesses for the past 19 years.

H2O Plumbers has evolved from providing only general plumbing services to the residents and businesses of George and surrounds, to also bringing exceptional plumbing divisions, all under the one umbrella.

"It brings me immense joy that I can offer my clients solutions to deeper plumbing issues that they have been struggling with," says Coetsee.


> Beyond general plumbing services, their services also include specialised plumbing services: core drilling, pipe location, leak detection, drain hydro-jetting, drain blasting, CCTV drain inspection, drain milling and concrete removal.


"I am deeply humbled to receive this award for the third consecutive year. It would not be possible without my incredible teams who work tirelessly in this very demanding trade," says Coetsee.

"I want to express my deepest gratitude to all who took the time to vote for our vibrant family-owned company. It has shown me that our clients, friends and family value our service, commitment and accomplishments and it inspires me to strive for an even higher form of excellence each day."

H2O Plumbers would like to extend huge congratulations to each plumbing company that was nominated in this category.


> "It is an honour to work alongside each of you every day. We appreciate your camaraderie in this close-knit plumbing community in George, the heart of the Garden Route."


‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
